description_long: This is a modern, single-story residential house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The property is surrounded by a white perimeter wall and features a large paved driveway with multiple covered parking spaces and landscaped greenery. The house includes several distinct rooms, visible through the open roof, and a prominent front entryway with steps and a small porch. The exterior is finished in a neutral gray color, complemented by white window frames and doors, and the grounds are landscaped with trees and shrubs. The rear of the house features a long balcony or veranda, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern along the facade.
description: A modern, single-story gray house with a flat roof, large driveway, covered parking, and landscaped grounds, surrounded by a white wall.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long driveway, covered parking, and landscaped garden along the left side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, steps, porch, and multiple covered parking spaces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, parking, and a large tree near the house.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the long balcony/veranda and symmetrical window arrangement along the back facade.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a small porch, and a simple door, flanked by windows and minimal decorative elements.
